channel.title: HaldeRex | A Cloud Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content on HaldeRex | A Cloud Tech Blog

item.title: Dynamic AND Mail-enabled security groups with Azure Automation
item.description: Dynamic AND Mail-enabled security groups are a highly wanted feature in Azure AD and Exchange Online. This article describes how to achieve this using Azure Automation.

item.title: About me
item.description: A techie since childhood, driven by great curiosity for technology and constantly looking for new areas to explore. I’m particularly passionate about Microsoft’s Azure and Microsoft 365, as I think it’s one of the most innovative and exciting cloud platforms.
